subcodes.first_line: O ye radiant Baha'is! I am ever anticipating that you make Minneapolis the Paradise of Abha
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all
